# The Good Guys
> Australia's leading appliance and consumer electronics retailer, operating 100+ stores nationwide. Sells TVs, fridges, washing machines, laptops, air conditioners and more from all major brands at competitive prices. Price match guarantee. Delivery and professional installation available.

## Products
- [Televisions](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/televisions): 4K, OLED, QLED and smart TVs from Samsung, LG, Sony, Hisense and TCL.
- [Air Conditioners](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/air-conditioners): Split system, portable and window air conditioners. Professional installation available.
- [Refrigerators](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/refrigerators): French door, side-by-side, top mount and bottom mount fridges from all major brands.
- [Washing Machines](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/washing-machines): Front loader, top loader, and washer-dryer combos. Energy star rated.
- [Dishwashers](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/dishwashers): Freestanding and integrated dishwashers.
- [Laptops & Computers](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/laptops-computers): Windows laptops, MacBooks, Chromebooks and 2-in-1 devices.
- [Smartphones](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/phones-mobile-phones): iPhones, Samsung Galaxy, and prepaid handsets.
- [Vacuum Cleaners](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/vacuum-cleaners): Robot, stick, upright and handheld vacuums from Dyson, Roborock and more.
- [Coffee Machines](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/coffee-machines): Espresso machines, pod machines, and bean-to-cup from Breville, DeLonghi and Nespresso.
- [Small Appliances](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/small-appliances): Air fryers, microwaves, kettles, toasters, blenders and more.
- [Headphones & Speakers](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/headphones): Wireless headphones, earbuds, soundbars and Bluetooth speakers.
- [Cameras](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/cameras): DSLR, mirrorless, point-and-shoot and action cameras.

## Buying Guides
- [Best TVs Buying Guide](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/buying-guide/best-tvs): How to choose a TV — screen size, resolution, OLED vs QLED, smart platform comparison.
- [Best Air Conditioners Buying Guide](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/buying-guide/best-air-conditioners): Split system vs portable, capacity sizing by room, energy efficiency star ratings.
- [Best Washing Machines Buying Guide](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/buying-guide/best-washing-machines): Front loader vs top loader, load capacity, spin speed, energy and water ratings.
- [Best Fridges Buying Guide](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/buying-guide/best-fridges): Fridge styles, capacity sizing, energy ratings and features explained.
- [Best Laptops Buying Guide](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/buying-guide/best-laptops): Windows vs Mac, processor and RAM guide, use case recommendations for students and professionals.
- [Best Robot Vacuums Buying Guide](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/buying-guide/best-robot-vacuums): Suction power, mapping technology, self-empty docking stations.

## Services
- [Delivery & Installation](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/delivery-information): Same-day and next-day delivery available in metro areas. Professional installation for appliances and air conditioners.
- [Price Match Guarantee](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/price-match): The Good Guys will match any competitor's advertised price on identical in-stock products.
- [Good Guys Product Care](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/extended-warranty): Extended protection plans for appliances and electronics beyond manufacturer warranty.
- [Concierge Service](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/concierge): In-store product experts available to help choose the right product.
- [Store Locations](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/stores): 100+ stores across Australia — find your nearest Good Guys store.
- [Latest Deals & News](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/whats-new): Current promotions, product launches and brand news.

## Policies
- [Returns Policy](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/returns-policy): 30-day returns on most products in original condition.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/privacy-policy)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/terms-and-conditions)
- [Accessibility](https://www.thegoodguys.com.au/accessibility)
